rationale: In the citing paper, Erdem and Sun (2002) is cited in the model-derivation section only as an example of studies that use a weighted or exponentially smoothed marcom input in stock models. The authors do not discuss that paper's substantive findings, build hypotheses from it, or position their contribution as extending/refining/challenging it. The citation functions as illustrative background within a broad methods/literature list rather than a paper-specific driver of the meta-analysis argument.
